text:
customers are increasingly asking us for certainty on capacity. as models get better, we expect that the world will be capacity-constrained for some time.

we are offering discounted tokens for 1-3 year commits.

(it also helps us plan, so hopefully a big win-win.)

we will offer this until we sell out of our current allocation for this program. (we will make sure to leave enough capacity for ChatGPT, Codex, etc.)

we plan to offer it again in the future; our intention remains to build as much compute as fast as we can.

🚨Our paper is out in PNAS: we found classic human persuasion techniques worked on AIs in a "parahuman" way, making them agree to objectionable requests (upping compliance from 35% to 51%)

It worked on a range of major LLMs though newer models resist more https://t.co/BgsFPgpB1E https://t.co/6KHSrBGEcM

People, especially young people hate AI....
Let's try and figure out why. https://t.co/IkwJAxMkF7

Ok re: the Google iO announcements: 
1. How do you use spark in Gemini app and how to use in phone is it out yet?
2. How do you use Omni? What is the best place to generate these videos?
3. What are your thoughts on the new flash model? Worth using?

RT @godofprompt: 🚨 One prompt inside Claude's Cowork feature just wiped someone's data from every major data broker.
